channel.title: Asides on Deuts Log
channel.description: Recent content in Asides on Deuts Log

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQQCAJ35R3VQQFH7M8FB5Z5V
item.description: I hate it that almost all links in the Pangolin dashboard are behind the Enterprise paywall. Can’t we just use an app without these prompts to upgrade our accounts? I hate it!
item.content:encoded: I hate it that almost all links in the Pangolin dashboard are behind the Enterprise paywall. Can’t we just use an app without these prompts to upgrade our accounts? I hate it!

item.title: Moonfin
item.description:
Moonfin

Moonfin for Android TV is an enhanced Jellyfin client derived from the official Jellyfin Android TV project, optimized for a different viewing experience on Android TV, Nvidia Shield, and Amazon Fire TV devices. Moonfin also supports Emby Server 4.8.0.0+, allowing you to connect to either Jellyfin or Emby from a single app.
item.content:encoded:
Moonfin

Moonfin for Android TV is an enhanced Jellyfin client derived from the official Jellyfin Android TV project, optimized for a different viewing experience on Android TV, Nvidia Shield, and Amazon Fire TV devices. Moonfin also supports Emby Server 4.8.0.0+, allowing you to connect to either Jellyfin or Emby from a single app.

item.title: SkySend | Encrypted File & Note Sharing
item.description:
SkySend | Encrypted File & Note Sharing

Share files and notes securely and encrypted with SkySend. Whether texts, passwords, SSH keys or code snippets - all end-to-end encrypted, automatically deleted, and completely free.
This is an alternative to Enclosed, but with API support. I wonder when will it offer username and password for admin, though.
item.content:encoded:
SkySend | Encrypted File & Note Sharing

Share files and notes securely and encrypted with SkySend. Whether texts, passwords, SSH keys or code snippets - all end-to-end encrypted, automatically deleted, and completely free.
This is an alternative to Enclosed, but with API support. I wonder when will it offer username and password for admin, though.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQ965KDH70B3YTGPJGW9Y3P5
item.description:
AFPSLAI declares an Expected Distribution Advance (EDA) rate of 13.5% per annum or 3.375% for the 1st Quarter 2026. EDA payout and release of checks representing excess CCA/EDA starts on April 27, 2026 (Monday).

Sad news for AFPSLAI investors, dividend decreased from the previous 17% to 13.5% per annum.
item.content:encoded:
AFPSLAI declares an Expected Distribution Advance (EDA) rate of 13.5% per annum or 3.375% for the 1st Quarter 2026. EDA payout and release of checks representing excess CCA/EDA starts on April 27, 2026 (Monday).

Sad news for AFPSLAI investors, dividend decreased from the previous 17% to 13.5% per annum.

item.title: Obsidian LiveSync Settings to Configure
item.description:
Obsidian LiveSync Settings to Configure

This will sync Plugin settings as well.
item.content:encoded:
Obsidian LiveSync Settings to Configure

This will sync Plugin settings as well.

item.title: Setting Up Obsidian LiveSync with Couchdb
item.description:
Setting Up Obsidian LiveSync with Couchdb

Learn how to enable real-time sync for Obsidian using CouchDB on Ubuntu. This guide covers installation, user creation, and configuring the LiveSync plugin.
item.content:encoded:
Setting Up Obsidian LiveSync with Couchdb

Learn how to enable real-time sync for Obsidian using CouchDB on Ubuntu. This guide covers installation, user creation, and configuring the LiveSync plugin.

item.title: Setting Up Self-Hosted Obsidian LiveSync
item.description:
Setting Up Self-Hosted Obsidian LiveSync

DB Tech shows how to set up Obsidian LiveSync using CouchDB via Docker.
item.content:encoded:
Setting Up Self-Hosted Obsidian LiveSync

DB Tech shows how to set up Obsidian LiveSync using CouchDB via Docker.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQ2TXWSDEGMGRM5TQMANDPV4
item.description: I subscribed to Amazon Prime because of NBA live coverage, but they apparently are not covering any live games for the rest of the first round of the 2026 Playoffs. What a waste of money!
item.content:encoded: I subscribed to Amazon Prime because of NBA live coverage, but they apparently are not covering any live games for the rest of the first round of the 2026 Playoffs. What a waste of money!

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQ26SN2RP3NTGT3M169AJ8B9
item.description: This AI thing really gets confusing fast. #ChatGPT / OpenAI or #Claude or #Gemini. If Claude: Chat, Cowork or Code. If Code: CLI, Desktop or VS Code. Then Pro etc. vs. API? Please, can we just have one good product and move on?
item.content:encoded: This AI thing really gets confusing fast. #ChatGPT / OpenAI or #Claude or #Gemini. If Claude: Chat, Cowork or Code. If Code: CLI, Desktop or VS Code. Then Pro etc. vs. API? Please, can we just have one good product and move on?

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQ1TTDBDEW6EFGDF4GK31K68
item.description: @nextgraph Sorry about that. The original link was to my publicly shared notes. I updated it based on the 2 app’s current capabilities, and made a blog post. You may check it here: deuts.org/∞
item.content:encoded: @nextgraph Sorry about that. The original link was to my publicly shared notes. I updated it based on the 2 app’s current capabilities, and made a blog post. You may check it here: deuts.org/∞
